title: daemon store: get_space_members no LIMIT — unbounded member list per space in Space/get
description: daemon/src/store.rs get_space_members() (line 685) issues SELECT with no LIMIT. Called once per space in the Space/get handler (jmap.rs:964). A space with thousands of members returns all rows into a Vec<SpaceMemberRow>. Combined with N+1 queries (one get_space_members per space returned by get_spaces), this creates O(S × M) memory pressure where S=number of spaces, M=members per space. Fix: add LIMIT to get_space_members and paginate space member lists, or return only member count in Space/get and expose members via a separate SpaceMember/query.
notes: Part of security review round 23 (epic nie-nvk2)
